arts.ttl: Liverpool v Southampton, Brighton v Fulham, and more: football – live
arts.sum: All the latest updates from the Saturday afternoon action Live scores | Premier League top scorers | Email Dominic You’ll have all no doubt checked the team news on your various apps and websites, but allow me to run through the headlines. Cody Gakpo is still absent for Liverpool, with Arne Slot handing a start to Darwin Nunez against Southampton as part of three changes from the side that snuck past PSG in midweek. Curtis Jones and Kostas Tsimikas also start. Kamaldeen Sulemana leads the line for Southampton. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Brighton vs Fulham: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Brighton & Hove Albion are aiming to extend their five-game winning streak on Saturday when they host Fulham in the Premier League. Fulham have also managed more away points than home in the Premier League this term and can leapfrog Brighton in the standings with victory on the south coast.
